description: Phase 18 integrity rule 4: every dispatcher primary case in tool/_n6_lib must appear in scanner_registry.{time_invariant,time_dependent,meta} — unless it is a built-in non-scanner command (continuous-scan, fast, telemetry). Catches silent dispatcher additions that forget to update the manifest registry.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_engine_integrity.json ] && jq -r "if .checks.dispatcher_orphans == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_engine_integrity.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
